From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Donetsk  
Донецьк

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
|  | |
| Proportion | 4:5[[1]](#cite_note-vxru-1) |
| Adopted | 27 September 2004[[1]](#cite_note-vxru-1) |
| Design | Two even horizontal stripes, [azure](/wiki/Azure_(heraldry) "Azure (heraldry)") above and [black](/wiki/Sable_(heraldry) "Sable (heraldry)") below, with the shield from the city's [coat of arms](/wiki/Coat_of_arms "Coat of arms") overlaid in [gold](/wiki/Or_(heraldry) "Or (heraldry)") centrally. |
|  | |

Not to be confused with [the flag of Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Flag_of_Donetsk_Oblast "Flag of Donetsk Oblast").

The **flag of Donetsk** has two horizontal stripes with the shield (in [heraldry, an *escutcheon*](/wiki/Escutcheon_(heraldry) "Escutcheon (heraldry)")) of the city's [coat of arms](/wiki/Coat_of_arms "Coat of arms") overlaid centrally.

## Description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Flag_of_Donetsk&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Description")]

A rectangular panel with a ratio of 1.5 length to 1.2 width ([5:4](/wiki/5:4 "5:4")). The flag is divided horizontally into two equal parts, the top half colored [azure](/wiki/Azure_(heraldry) "Azure (heraldry)") and the bottom [sable](/wiki/Sable_(heraldry) "Sable (heraldry)") (black). Overlaid in the center lies the shield (escutcheon) from the [coat of arms of Donetsk](/wiki/Coat_of_arms_of_Donetsk "Coat of arms of Donetsk"). The flag is hoist at the left, with the flagpole tipped.[[1]](#cite_note-vxru-1)

The shield is a [pentagonal](/wiki/Pentagon "Pentagon") extension of a rectangle, with an [Or](/wiki/Or_(heraldry) "Or (heraldry)") (gold) hand clutching a hammer as if to strike, with a star at the edge of the top right [canton](/wiki/Canton_(heraldry) "Canton (heraldry)"), which should not be confused with it being at the [upper dexter corner of the flag](/wiki/Canton_(flag) "Canton (flag)") itself, which generally signifies a war flag.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

The shield is a symbol from [socialist heraldry](/wiki/Socialist_heraldry "Socialist heraldry") and denotes the city's status as a major centre for the mining of [coal](/wiki/Coal "Coal") and production of [steel](/wiki/Steel "Steel").[[1]](#cite_note-vxru-1)

Archived from [the original](http://www.vexillographia.ru/ukraine/towns/doneck.htm) on 2016-03-04. "Approved by the Decision №13 / 5 of Donetsk City Council September 27, 2004"
